_comment: Nucleus local settings — edit to customize behavior. All values have safe defaults.

health._comment: Controls the behavior of `nucleus health` and the automatic 60s schedule

memory._comment: RAM thresholds in MB. Must match your system — lower if you have 8GB or less

watchdog._comment: Worker restart policy. backoff doubles on each failure up to max

timeouts._comment: Boot timeouts in seconds. Increase on slow machines

logging._comment: daily = one file per day (default). single = one file forever (legacy behavior)
